Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: return String.format("%s (offset=%d, length=%d)", mFilename, mOffset, mLength);

issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

The intent action `com.android.inputmethod.latin.DICT_DUMP (used to send a broadcast)` matches the intent filter of a non-exported receiver, registered via a call to `Context.registerReceiver`, or similar. If you are trying to invoke this specific receiver via the action then you should use `Intent.setPackage(<APPLICATION_ID>)`.

The intent action `com.android.inputmethod.dictionarypack.aosp.UNKNOWN_CLIENT (used to send a broadcast)` matches the intent filter of a non-exported component `com.android.inputmethod.latin.DictionaryPackInstallBroadcastReceiver` from a manifest. If you are trying to invoke this specific component via the action then you should make the intent explicit by calling `Intent.set{Component,Class,ClassName}`.

The intent action `com.android.inputmethod.dictionarypack.aosp.newdict (used to send a broadcast)` matches the intent filter of a non-exported receiver, registered via a call to `Context.registerReceiver`, or similar. If you are trying to invoke this specific receiver via the action then you should use `Intent.setPackage(<APPLICATION_ID>)`.

The intent action `com.android.inputmethod.dictionarypack.aosp.newdict (used to send a broadcast)` matches the intent filter of a non-exported receiver, registered via a call to `Context.registerReceiver`, or similar. If you are trying to invoke this specific receiver via the action then you should use `Intent.setPackage(<APPLICATION_ID>)`.

This intent could be coming from an untrusted source. It is later launched by an unprotected component com.android.inputmethod.dictionarypack.EventHandler. You could either make the component com.android.inputmethod.dictionarypack.EventHandler protected; or sanitize this intent using androidx.core.content.IntentSanitizer.
issue.errorLine1: public void onReceive(final Context context, final Intent intent) {

location.message: The unsafe intent is launched here.

issue.message: This broadcast receiver declares an intent-filter for a protected broadcast action string, which can only be sent by the system, not third-party applications. However, the receiver's onReceive method does not appear to call getAction to ensure that the received Intent's action string matches the expected value, potentially making it possible for another actor to send a spoofed intent with no action string or a different action string and cause undesired behavior. In this case, it is possible that the onReceive method passed the received Intent to another method that checked the action string. If so, this finding can safely be ignored.
issue.errorLine1: public void onReceive(final Context context, final Intent intent) {

issue.errorLine1: <string name="should_download_over_metered_prompt" msgid="2055970799464394373">"Det valgte sprog på din mobilenhed har en tilgængelig ordbog.<br/> Vi anbefaler, at du <b>downloader</b> ordbogen <xliff:g id="LANGUAGE_NAME">%1$s</xliff:g> for at forbedre din skriveoplevelse.<br/> <br/> Downloaden kan tage 1-2 minutter via 3G. Der opkræves muligvis et gebyr, hvis du ikke har et <b>ubegrænset dataabonnement</b>.<br/> Hvis du ikke er sikker på, hvilket dataabonnement du har, anbefaler vi, at du finder en Wi-Fi-forbindelse for at starte automatisk download.<br/> <br/> Tip! Du kan downloade og fjerne ordbøger ved at gå til <b>Sprog og indtastning</b> i menuen <b>Indstillinger</b> på din mobilenhed."</string>

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1: "Таны мобайл төхөөрөмждөө сонгосон хэлний толь бичиг боломжтой байна.<br/> Та бичих хэрэглээгээ сайжруулахын тулд %1$s толийг <b>татах</b&gt-г зөвлөж байна.<br/> <br/> 3G-р татахад 1-2 минут болно. Танд <b>хязгааргүй дата хэрэглээ</b>.<br/> байхгүй бол төлбөр ногдож болзошгүй. Та датаны төрлөө мэдэхгүй байгаа бол автоматаар татаж эхлэхийн тулд Wi-Fi холболттой газар олно уу.<br/> <br/> Зөвлөмж: Та утасныхаа цэсний Тохиргоо хэсгийн <b>Хэл, оролт</b>хэсэгт толь бичиг нэмэх, устгах боломжтой."

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="should_download_over_metered_prompt" msgid="2055970799464394373">"ภาษาที่คุณเลือกในอุปกรณ์เคลื่อนที่มีพจนานุกรมที่สามารถใช้ได้<br/> เราขอแนะนำให้คุณ<b>ดาวน์โหลดพจนานุกรม</b> <xliff:g id="LANGUAGE_NAME">%1$s</xliff:g> เพื่อรับประสบการณ์การพิมพ์ที่ดียิ่งขึ้น<br/> <br/> การดาวน์โหลดอาจใช้เวลา 1-2 นาทีผ่านทาง 3G ซึ่งอาจมีการเรียกเก็บเงินหากคุณไม่ได้ใช้<b>แผนบริการข้อมูลแบบไม่จำกัด</b>.<br/> หากไม่แน่ใจว่าใช้แผนบริการข้อมูลแบบใดอยู่ เราขอแนะนำให้เชื่อมต่อ Wi-Fi เพื่อเริ่มการดาวน์โหลดโดยอัตโนมัติ<br/> <br/> เคล็ดลับ: คุณสามารถดาวน์โหลดและนำพจนานุกรมออกได้โดยไปที่<b>ภาษาและการป้อนข้อมูล</b>ในเมนู<b>การตั้งค่า</b>บนอุปกรณ์เคลื่อนที่ของคุณ"</string>
